before_problem: The first contribution split 'controlled' as 'con- / trolled'.
The same contribution split 'grounding' as 'ground- / ing'.
The same contribution split 'optimization' as 'optimiza- / tion'.

change_summary.summary: Reworded the first contribution from a controlled-perturbation/interface/optimization phrasing into a shorter controlled-test sentence that removes the three visible linebreak splits while preserving the contribution boundary.
change_summary.final_wording: We make material conversion a controlled test of VLM grounding, not neutral asset cleanup.

observations: The page-2 comparison shows the first contribution no longer contains the targeted 'con- / trolled', 'ground- / ing', or 'optimiza- / tion' splits.
The accepted wording keeps material conversion framed as a controlled VLM-grounding test rather than neutral asset cleanup.
The final page-2 render keeps the contribution list and Related Work opening on the same page.
The final contact sheet remains 11 pages with no obvious float, table, or blank-page regression.
Existing Related Work splits such as 'set-' and 'referen-' are unchanged and outside this round's target.
